name: Iso11783FSMakeAbsolutePath
title: Iso11783FSMakeAbsolutePath
syntax: long Iso11783FSMakeAbsolutePath( char relPath[], char absPath[], dword mustExist, dword bufferSize, char buffer[] );
long Iso11783FSMakeAbsolutePath( char relPath[], char absPath[], dword mustExist, dword bufferSize, char buffer[], char volume[], long manufacturerCode );
description: This function converts an relative path into an absolute path including a conversion to uppercase characters. An absolute path begins with \ and refers to the root directory (see also Iso11783SetPath). A relative path could contain .. and ..
A path must follow the 8.3 format (8 character identifier with 4 character extension).

parameters.name: relPath
parameters.description: Relative path which could contain .. and .

parameters.name: mustExist
parameters.description: 1: check, if path exists and return an error if the file does not exist 0: the path must not exist

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: New path is copied to this buffer

parameters.name: volume
parameters.description: Name of the volume, this information and the manufacturer code are needed to resolve the root directory in the paths

parameters.name: manufacturerCode
parameters.description: Manufacturer code, this information and the volume are needed to resolve the root directory in the paths

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
